title: Nursery Rhyme. DXXVI. Natural History.
content:
Pussy sat by the fire-side
        In a basket full of coal-dust;
        Bas-
        ket,
        Coal-
        dust,
        In a basket full of coal-dust!
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DXXVI. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
